caption: In the video, a person is seen handling a stack of yellow cards or small boxes, carefully lifting one off the top of the stack. The setting appears to be a well-lit room with various items and equipment visible in the background, suggesting a workspace or studio environment. The individual's hands are prominently featured as they manipulate the objects, indicating a focus on precision and care. In the inset frames, another person is seated at a desk, possibly overseeing or recording the activity, with additional boxes and materials around them. The overall scene conveys a sense of organization and attention to detail, likely related to a hobby or professional task involving collectibles or small items.
